subcodes.first_line: O ye two candles of the Love of God! Your letters were received. Praise be to God that the Spirit of the Kingdom is day by day gaining
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو شمع محبه الله نامه های شما رسید الحمد لله روح ملکوتی روز بروز رو بقوت
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
